title: Next Steps for OpenFF Development
author: Gilson, Michael K.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Mike Gilson provides suggestions and potential next steps in the OpenFF development for discussion with pharma partners and collaborators. 

 The uploaded material contains presentation slides and video.
